agent.name: Kilo Code
agent.description: Kilo Code CLI through the Agent Client Protocol
runtime.install.title: Install Kilo Code for Tutti
runtime.install.description: Installs @kilocode/cli@7.4.11 only in Tutti's managed runtime directory.
runtime.authRequired: A session can open without credentials, but prompts require Kilo login or a configured AI provider. Run `kilo auth login` in a terminal or configure a provider before sending prompts.
runtime.networkRequired: The first ACP startup may need access to models.dev to load the model catalog.
